title: Whythereisasushi
description: First simple mod which add more sushi
body:
# Why there is a sushi

![Presentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/266163929e562090138fc84ac77c3a8d20a678cd.png)

## Requires Fabric Api

### English (US) and Polish Language Supported

**I highly recommend using mod like JEI to see all craftings**

After getting bored, I thought about creating my first minecraft mod

### Maki and Nigiri variants avaiable
Mod add Maki and Nigiri variants for now, most of them add vanilla effects for player, also there is chopsticks - when in left hand, sushi are eaten faster
### New Rice crop

![Rice crop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f75788178f569b3ca940ce449eee1b5ac55c6b96.png)

Mod have new plant - rice (it looks not great because of my painting skill :D ), put wheat seeds into crafting to create new rice seeds.


![Creating rice seeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15024607d3ba70c213a52a9627462dd162d0c38.png)


### Creating sushi
To create sushi you need new nori sheet, which is created using original minecraft dried kelp

![Creating Nori sheet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a3d36681532287fa448c69a550f6f8300ba9245.png)

**Maki sushi needs:**

-Cooked Rice

-Nori Sheet

-Food

![Sake Maki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a991d97a2586415044f72e1ce0271d1fd4165f.png)

**Nigiri sushi needs:**

-Cooked Rice

-Food

![Nigiri Sake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa725994d8e60658933a03f4e74779a6e8891b0f.png)

90% Sushi can be created in 2x2 crafting grid, some needs crafting table.

You can use fish like: Salmon,Cod,Tropical - they add only food and saturation

You can also use items like

-Pufferfish -> 50% Chance to poison effect

-Magma Cube -> Fire resistance but damage player

-Raw Rabbit -> Jump Boost

-Glow inc sac -> Night Vision

-Chorus Fruit -> Random teleport like chorus fruit, but it gives little more food bar

-Honey bottle -> Removes most of negative effects

-Phantom membrane -> Slow Falling

-Nautilus Shell -> Conduit Power

-Glistering melon slice & Ghast tear > Give Health Boost for short while (More red Hearts)

-Gold ingot -> Golden apple but better

![Nigiri Gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b717964fcf9d571ad1b122573bca31a552dd76fd.png) ![Golden Maki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49ce8da0f5bf71c48541055da8a6875da5cadbaa.png)
